summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Accounting Copilot Production AI Architecture Upgrade (v2.1.0-beta). All new features tested: Danish Chart of Accounts (73 accounts), VAT Codes (10 codes), Journals (8), AI Dashboard with role-based access. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components functional with proper role-based access control.
passed_tests: GET /api/accounting-data/available-countries - Returns DK as active, SE/NO prepared
AI Dashboard page renders correctly for admin users
AI Dashboard shows 'Access Denied' for SME users
Sidebar shows AI Dashboard link for admin users
Sidebar hides Admin/Accountant sections for SME users
critical_code_review_comments: Production AI Service (ai_production.py) well-structured with proper validation, retry logic, and vendor learning
Danish accounting data (danish_accounting.py) correctly implements 73 accounts, 10 VAT codes, 8 journals
VAT rules module (vat_rules.py) properly implements modular Nordic VAT rules with DK active, SE/NO prepared
Role-based access control working correctly - admin/accountant can access AI Dashboard, SME users denied
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production AI Architecture Upgrade fully tested. New features verified: (1) Danish Chart of Accounts with 73 accounts, (2) 10 VAT codes including reverse charge, (3) 8 standard journals, (4) AI Dashboard with accuracy metrics accessible only to admin/accountant roles, (5) Active company tracking for billing, (6) Vendor accuracy stats. All role-based access controls working correctly. Previous beta features (BetaBanner, FeedbackDialog, ExportButton) still functional.
